rubric: Grade audit responses on: correct CO article (727 / 727a / 728 / 729 / 725 / 730a), correct numeric threshold (20 mio / 40 mio / 250 / 10 / 7 years), accurate procedural description (audit phases, opting-out, going concern), no French (commissariat aux comptes / redressement judiciaire) or German (HGB / IDW) references that don't apply.
